steps.text: Fill the electrolytic cell with water and a little dilute sulfuric acid.
Insert two inert electrodes: cathode (-) and anode (+).
Connect a 6 V DC supply across the electrodes.
Switch on. Gas bubbles form at both electrodes and collect in the tubes.
Hydrogen collects at the cathode, oxygen at the anode, in a 2:1 volume ratio: 2 H2O -> 2 H2 + O2.
